reviews.comment:
El señor mayor que nos acaba de atender esta mañana se le fue la mano cerrando a golpes en reiteredas ocasiones de manera brusca la tapa del tanque de nafta hasta que logro cerrarla y al preguntarle porque lo hizo nos ninguneo, un mal educado.

(Translated by Google)
The elderly gentleman who served us this morning went too far, repeatedly and roughly slamming the gas tank cap shut until he finally managed to close it. When we asked him why he did it, he dismissed us; he was rude.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3508326397938303697/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNMTlyNGl3RRAB
